_source: docs/PLAN/PARITY-TARGETS.md §A (Schedule Quality) + §B (DCMA-14). Acumen Fuse exports for the non-CUI commercial-construction sample (ADR-0003/0005).

_deltas.DCMA06_high_float: engine computes 43 (P2) / 40 (P5); Acumen golden is 44 / 41 (+1). One near-status activity per project carries MS Project's progress-aware total float > 44d while the pure-logic CPM gives <= 44d. Pass/fail (>>5%) unaffected. ADR-0012; tracked to zero at M9.

_scores_deferred.note: Acumen composite scores use a proprietary Bad/Neutral/Good weighting not published in the exports or the Acumen 8.11 metric guide. Per-check counts/pass-fail are reproduced exactly; the composite scores are an M9 calibration item (ADR-0012).
